$comment: Single source of truth for the category taxonomy. Scripts and humans both read this. Adding a category? Add it here and create the matching categories/<id>/ folder.

models.opus: Deep reasoning, architecture, security, high-stakes judgment, and multi-step strategy.
models.sonnet: The workhorse tier — most implementation, design, content, and analysis.
models.haiku: Fast, deterministic, format-bound work — extraction, drafting, simple transforms.

categories.title: Engineering
categories.description: Core software engineering — backend, frontend, full-stack, mobile, and system architecture.

categories.title: Languages & Frameworks
categories.description: Deep language and framework specialists with idiomatic, production-grade expertise.

categories.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
categories.description: Cloud, CI/CD, reliability, observability, and platform operations.

categories.title: Quality & Testing
categories.description: Testing, code review, performance, and release confidence.

categories.title: Security & Compliance
categories.description: Application security, threat detection, auditing, and regulatory compliance.

categories.title: Data & AI
categories.description: Data engineering, analytics, machine learning, and applied AI systems.

categories.title: Design & UX
categories.description: Product design, UX research, brand, and visual craft.

categories.title: Product & Management
categories.description: Product strategy, delivery, discovery, and team coordination.

categories.title: Marketing & Growth
categories.description: Growth, content, SEO/GEO, advertising, and lifecycle marketing.

categories.title: Social Media
categories.description: Platform-native social strategy, content, and community engagement.

categories.title: Sales & Revenue
categories.description: Sales engineering, deal strategy, outbound, and revenue operations.

categories.title: Business, Finance & Legal
categories.description: Finance, legal, HR, support, and back-office operations.

categories.title: Game Development
categories.description: Game design and engine specialists — Unity, Unreal, Godot, Roblox, and Blender.

categories.title: Regional Markets
categories.description: Region-specific commerce and platform specialists (China-market and cross-border).

categories.title: Specialized Domains
categories.description: Blockchain, XR, embedded, scientific, civil, and creative/worldbuilding domains.

categories.title: Meta & Orchestration
categories.description: Orchestrators and coordinators that compose, route, and manage other agents.
